notes: Puzzles rebuilt around real decisions: 500 graded challenges across 12 tactical families and 478 distinct board states, including 10 Expert puzzles that span two of your turns. Harder positions reject any-order attack lines, legacy shallow harvests stay out of rotation, the opponent's hand remains hidden, and titles no longer reveal the tactic. Difficulty is proof-based: 108 Easy, 142 Medium, 165 Hard, and 85 Expert, with mechanics and grading evidence shown after solving. Official keyword and timing fixes: Rush: Character no longer behaves like full Rush or attacks active Characters; Trigger cards move correctly and finish before Double Attack continues; printed Unblockable is recognized; Once Per Turn resets after field re-entry; Counter Events can buff another eligible friendly card; and the exact End of Your Opponent's Turn timing works. Hovering a face-up Life card now previews its face instead of the card back.
